docs_updated: N/A - no spec or ADR update was required for this scoped preprocess implementation

artifacts.changelog_entry: [#358] Sprint C imaging preprocess subset B impl - replaces the T-IMG-008 `geometry.py`, T-IMG-009 `ConvertDType`, and T-IMG-010 `AxisSplit`/`AxisMerge` skeleton `NotImplementedError` bodies with narrow-scope implementations. Geometry: `Rotate`, `Flip`, `Crop`, `Pad`, and `Resize` now operate on `Image` inputs, use explicit ProcessBlock ClassVars, broadcast per-slice 2D work via `iterate_over_axes`, accept mask-driven crop boxes, and update `meta.pixel_size` proportionally on resize while preserving metadata/user lineage through the standard derived-object path. ConvertDType: supports `uint8`/`uint16`/`float32`/`float64`/`bool` targets with explicit `linear` and `clip` modes plus zero-threshold bool conversion. AxisSplit/AxisMerge: provide typed Collection-based split/merge over `t`/`z`/`c`/`lambda`, validate axis/order/shape consistency, append `meta.source_file` with `__axis=index`, and partition channel/wavelength metadata on split. Plugin tests replace the skipped stubs with deterministic behavioral coverage for the three files, and `tests/plugins/test_phase11_skeleton.py` gains `test_imaging_preprocess_b_impl_smoke()` so the workflow gate can detect the concrete implementation. (@Codex, 2026-04-07, branch: feat/sprint-c/imaging-preprocess-b, session: 20260407-233745-phase-11-imaging-preprocess-chunk-1)
